```{=html}
<div style="width:84%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;background:#1E1E2E;box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);">

  <div style="background:linear-gradient(180deg,#3A3950,#2A2940);padding:0.5em 0.85em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;">
   <span style="width:0.55em;height:0.55em;border-radius:50%;background:#FF5F56;"></span>
   <span style="width:0.55em;height:0.55em;border-radius:50%;background:#FFBD2E;"></span>
   <span style="width:0.55em;height:0.55em;border-radius:50%;background:#27C93F;"></span>
   <span style="margin:0 auto;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;">analysis.py</span>
  </div>

  <div style="padding:1em 1.4em 1.1em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6em;line-height:1.8;text-align:left;">
   <div style="color:#5C6B80;"># Drop respondents who skipped the income question.</div>
   <div style="color:#5C6B80;"># Structural skip (only employed respondents see it),</div>
   <div style="color:#5C6B80;"># not a refusal &mdash; see codebook §4.2.</div>
   <div><span style="color:#69B4F0;">df</span> <span style="color:#F8F7F0;">=</span> <span style="color:#69B4F0;">df</span><span style="color:#F8F7F0;">[</span><span style="color:#69B4F0;">df</span><span style="color:#F8F7F0;">[</span><span style="color:#FFB84D;">"employed"</span><span style="color:#F8F7F0;">]</span> <span style="color:#FF6F8E;">==</span> <span style="color:#FFB84D;">1</span><span style="color:#F8F7F0;">]</span></div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.95em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.5em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.85em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.08);border-left:3px solid #2C8475;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#2C8475;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;">defensible later</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.15em;">Reviewers six months from now can read your reasoning.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.85em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.08);border-left:3px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#5654A2;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;">guardrail for AI</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.15em;">Stops the next session from "helpfully" rewriting it.</div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
